title: Geraniospermum terebintaceum
taxonomy: Geraniospermum terebintaceum is classified within the family Menispermaceae. It belongs to the order Ranunculales. The family Menispermaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as moonseed or menispermaceous plants. Menispermaceae are native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world, particularly in Asia. The order Ranunculales is a clade of flowering plants that also includes the families Ranunculaceae and Berberidaceae.
